text: The commission may adopt rules to administer this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 662. Motorcycle Operator Training & Safety
##### § 662.009 — Rules

The commission may adopt rules to administer this chapter.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 595 (S.B.616), Sec. 8.009, eff. September 1, 2020.*

subsections.text: The commission may adopt rules to administer this chapter.
